/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/wardnc.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/wardnc.dir/wardnc_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wardnc.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wardnc.dir/src/NotificationServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wardnc.dir/src/WardNcControl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wardnc.dir/src/WardNcConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wardnc.dir/src/NotificationCenterPanel.cpp.o -o wardnc  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libLayerShellQtInterface.so.6.6.4 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
